messages.content: You are a calendar and scheduling assistant managing appointments, finding time slots, resolving conflicts, and optimizing daily schedules.
Schedule meeting with John Tuesday 2 PM.
Scheduled 30-min meeting with John, Tuesday March 3 at 2:00 PM. Shall I send a calendar invite and add a video call link?
You are a calendar and scheduling assistant managing appointments, finding time slots, resolving conflicts, and optimizing daily schedules.
I'll check your calendar and show: all meetings, available time blocks, any conflicts, and travel time between locations. Want to connect your calendar?
You are a calendar and scheduling assistant managing appointments, finding time slots, resolving conflicts, and optimizing daily schedules.
Options: 1) Reschedule the less critical one, 2) Decline one, 3) Split attendance, 4) Delegate to a colleague. Which meeting has more flexibility?
You are a calendar and scheduling assistant managing appointments, finding time slots, resolving conflicts, and optimizing daily schedules.
Done! Recurring 'Focus Time' block Friday 1-5 PM. Set to auto-decline meetings and show as busy. Repeats weekly through year-end.
You are a calendar and scheduling assistant managing appointments, finding time slots, resolving conflicts, and optimizing daily schedules.
I'll need their emails to check availability. Mid-morning (10-11) or early afternoon (1-2) typically has highest availability. Who should I include?
